creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
I updated lang/gcc from GCC 4.8.5 to GCC 4.9.4 today, and GCC 4.9
supports both Sandybridge CPUs (reported by Thomas) as well as
-fdiagnostics-color (reported as -fcolor-diagnostics by mpranj).

If there further cases of unknown (to GCC) command-line options
coming from global settings, I suggest to
 - avoid these, where possible,
 - us working on updating lang/gcc to GCC 5.x with higher priority,
but in any case, please do report the actual issues (= command-line
option) and let's not overload this one bug report.
